changesProposed.name: Agility Robotics

current.name: Agility Robotics
current.founder: Jonathan Hurst, Damion Shelton, Mikhail Jones

verified.name: Agility Robotics
verified.description: A humanoid robotics company that develops and manufactures Digit, a bipedal robot for warehouse and logistics automation. Digit has been deployed commercially and is assembled in Salem, Oregon.
verified.notes: Company announced a rebrand to 'Agility' on March 5, 2026 per Wikipedia source [2]. Sources do not contain verified information on funding stage, total raised, valuation, or specific investors. Database entry mentions 'Series D' and '$400M+' but these cannot be verified from provided sources.

changesProposed.name: Fervo Energy

verified.name: Fervo Energy
verified.description: Geothermal company that develops enhanced geothermal systems (EGS) using horizontal drilling techniques adapted from oil and gas. Operates Project Red in Nevada and Cape Station in Utah.
verified.notes: Company went public in May 2026 based on newsroom references in source 0 (headlines dated May 17, 2026). Wikipedia source 2 lists company as 'Private' but appears outdated. Most recent Series E funding of $462M in November 2025 led by B Capital per source 2.

changesProposed.notes: Company went public in May 2026 based on newsroom references in source 0 (headlines dated May 17, 2026). Wikipedia source 2 lists company as 'Private' but appears outdated. Most recent Series E funding of $462M in November 2025 led by B Capital per source 2.

changesProposed.name: Gecko Robotics

verified.name: Gecko Robotics
verified.description: AI-powered wall-climbing robots that inspect critical infrastructure including power plants, refineries, and pipelines. The company's Cantilever platform provides high-fidelity physical data and analytics for asset health monitoring across energy, manufacturing, defense, and other industries.
verified.notes: Series D funding round occurred in June 2025, raising $125M and valuing the company at $1.25B. Company operates internationally with offices in Houston, Boston, New York City, Washington DC, and Abu Dhabi in addition to Pittsburgh headquarters. Source [2] is about GrayMatter Robotics, not Gecko Robotics, and was not used.

changesProposed.name: SpaceX

verified.name: SpaceX
verified.description: American spaceflight, telecommunications, and artificial intelligence company that conducts more orbital launches annually than any other launch provider. Operates three divisions: Space, Connectivity (Starlink), and Artificial Intelligence (Grok).
verified.notes: IPO occurred June 12, 2026, raising $86 billion (largest IPO in history per source). Database entry claims $1.5T valuation and IPO stage designation, but sources only confirm $86B raised in IPO and that company is now Public (Nasdaq: SPCX). No valuation figure found in sources. Database entry claims 165 Falcon 9 launches in 2025 and 81% of mass to orbit - not verified in provided sources.

changesProposed.name: Varda Space Industries

verified.name: Varda Space Industries
verified.description: American privately held space research company that designs, builds, and flies spacecraft to process pharmaceuticals in microgravity and return them to Earth via reentry capsules.
verified.notes: Wikipedia states $42M Series A in July 2021 and $90M Series B in April 2024, totaling $132M. Database entry claims $187M Series C and $131M total raised, which cannot be verified from provided sources. Database entry lists 5 missions in 2025; Wikipedia confirms W-2, W-3, W-4 launches in 2025 and W-1 in 2023. No Series C funding is mentioned in any source.
